subcodes.first_line: Every handmaid who, in the Day of God, attaineth the wine of bounty is reckoned among the men and mentioned in the Book as one of the righteous
subcodes.first_line_orig: هر یک از اماء که در یوم الهی برحیق عنایت رحمانی فائز شد او از رجال محسوب و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @praise and encouragement, @role and station of women, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
